partner.name: Chison Medical Technologies
partner.desc: Leading ultrasound device manufacturer — supplies simulation and clinical machines for SonoSchool hands-on workshops.

partner.name: MedPro Medical Services
partner.desc: Primary regional distributor supporting event logistics and equipment supply across North Africa.

partner.name: TAMARA ACADEMIA
partner.desc: Strategic education partner delivering SonoSchool-accredited courses throughout the Gulf.

partner.name: ALFURSSAN
partner.desc: Healthcare group hosting SonoSchool simulation centres and live workshop venues.

partner.name: Advanced Vision
partner.desc: EdTech partner powering the digital learning platform and virtual simulation modules.

partner.name: The Academy of Sciences
partner.desc: Academic partner providing CME accreditation and faculty development programmes in Jordan.
